title: Chè Tào Xọn

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 200g mung beans (đậu xanh), husked and split

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Steam the mung beans until fully cooked and tender.
Add the sugar to 1.5 liters of water in a large pot. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Add the tapioca starch gradually, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and becomes glossy and slightly translucent.
Fold in the steamed mung beans. Stir to distribute them evenly.
